channel.title: Cloud Certifications on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud Certifications on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cloud Certifications Guide: AWS, Azure, and GCP Certs for IT Professionals
item.category: "cloud certifications" , "AWS certification" , "Azure certification" , "Google Cloud certification" , "AWS Solutions Architect" , "AZ-104" , "AZ-900" , "AWS Cloud Practitioner" , "cloud engineer certifications" , "cloud certification roadmap 2026"
item.description: The complete guide to cloud certifications in 2026 — AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud certification paths, which ones to get first, and what they prove to employers.

item.title: IT Certifications, Degrees, and Training
item.category: "IT certifications" , "CompTIA" , "Cisco CCNA" , "cloud certifications" , "AWS certification" , "Microsoft certification" , "IT degree" , "IT bootcamp" , "certification roadmap"
item.description: The complete guide to IT certifications, degrees, and bootcamps. CompTIA, Cisco, Microsoft, cloud certs, and how to build the right credential stack for your career.
